sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43902" key="eu)hkoe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐηκο-έω</orth>, <sense id="n43902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐήκοος</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">listen and obey willingly</tr_>, c. gen., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν κρινόντων</foreign> Jusj. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
